summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements well. REQ-3 (lazy loading in App.tsx), REQ-4 (splash screen in RootLayout.tsx), and REQ-6 (QueryClient staleTime/gcTime configuration) are clearly addressed. REQ-5 is partially addressed through RootLayout.tsx changes but lacks explicit evidence of async actor initialization changes in useActor.ts (which is a constrained file). The implementation also adds per-query staleTime overrides in useQueries.ts and an authentication timeout mechanism beyond what was strictly requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Actor creation does not block the main thread during initial render; authentication state resolves independently from the initial page paint; app shell renders without waiting for actor to be fully initialized.
missing_requirements.reason: RootLayout.tsx defers authenticated layout rendering and shows a splash screen, which partially satisfies REQ-5. However, there is no evidence of changes to actor initialization logic itself to make it non-blocking. The constraint prohibits modifying useActor.ts, but the requirement explicitly targets actor initialization being async and non-blocking. The RootLayout changes only defer rendering after the actor is ready rather than making actor init genuinely non-blocking on the main thread.

hallucinated_features.description: Per-query staleTime overrides in useQueries.ts with STALE_REALTIME (5s) for chat messages and STALE_DEFAULT (30s) constants, plus refetchInterval on useGetUserProfile.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 only requested configuring the global QueryClient with sensible staleTime and cacheTime values. The per-query staleTime overrides and real-time refetch intervals in useQueries.ts go beyond what was specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Lazy loading of OnboardingPage inside RootLayout.tsx.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements only specified lazy loading for route-level page components in App.tsx. Lazy loading OnboardingPage inside RootLayout.tsx was not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Authentication timeout mechanism using useAuthTimeout, AuthTimeoutState component, and a 30-second timeout error state in RootLayout.tsx.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentioned adding authentication timeout handling or timeout error states. This is additional functionality not present in the build spec.
